Description: Unique identifier assigned to each participant.
Age of the participant at the time of the experiment.
Number of years of education reported by the participant.
Participant handedness reported as right left or ambidextrous.
Identifier for the experimental session completed by the participant.
Technical identifier generated during preprocessing for a single row. The numeric suffix does not represent the real presentation order.
Experimental task completed in the current trial.
Type of presented string coded as word or pseudoword.
Italian word or pseudoword presented to the participant.
English translation of the Italian word when available.
Binary indicator of whether the participant response was correct.
Time taken by the participant to respond in milliseconds.
Participant rating of the extent to which the word referent is experienced through vision on a scale from 0 to 5.
Participant rating of the extent to which the word referent is experienced through taste on a scale from 0 to 5.
Participant rating of the extent to which the word referent is experienced through touch on a scale from 0 to 5.
Participant rating of the extent to which the word referent is experienced through smell on a scale from 0 to 5.
Participant rating of the extent to which the word referent is experienced through hearing on a scale from 0 to 5.
